channel.title: CyberScryb Changelog
channel.description: Product updates and release notes from CyberScryb.

item.title: Client-Side Excellence and Hash Sync (v4.1.2)
item.description: Broke the last few HTTP tethers. Tools now serialize state into LZ-compressed URL hashes. Because saving your configurations should not require an API request to a database I have to pay for, and you have to worry about.
